name: @rune-langium/lsp-worker
description: Cloudflare Worker + Durable Object hosting the Rune DSL Langium LSP for the Studio (feature 014-studio-prod-ready, US3). Per-workspace DOs hold langium services + WS hibernation; the Worker mints HMAC-signed session tokens and gates the WS upgrade.
author: Pradeep Mouli <pmouli@mac.com> (https://github.com/pradeepmouli)
